text: Only 3 players in Premier League history have scored 20+ goals in 3 consecutive seasons. Salah just joined them.
Arsenal's xG against in the last 10 games: 6.2. Goals conceded: 1. Either the goalkeeper is having a historic run or the model is broken.
Man City have won 87% of games when scoring first at home this season. The problem? They've been behind at half-time 4 times in their last 6.
The Premier League's top 4 all have xG above 2.0 per game. The bottom 4 are all under 0.9. The gap between top and bottom has never been wider statistically.
Trent Alexander-Arnold averages more key passes per 90 than any other defender in the top 5 leagues. It's not even close.
Vinicius Jr has attempted 4.3 dribbles per game this season — and completed 68% of them. No winger in La Liga comes close.
Real Madrid have scored in the last 10 minutes of games 11 times this season. Coincidence or just superior fitness?
Barcelona's pressing intensity (PPDA) this season: 7.2. That means they allow fewer than 8 passes before applying pressure. Among the best in Europe.
Atletico Madrid have conceded just 3 goals from open play at home all season. The Metropolitano has become a fortress again.
Yamal is 17 and already averaging 2.1 shot-creating actions per 90 in La Liga. At his age, Messi was still in the B team.
Bayern have scored 40% of their Bundesliga goals in the second half. Their opponents have scored 60% of goals against them in the first half. Make of that what you will.
Leverkusen press harder than any team in the Bundesliga. Their PPDA of 6.1 means they suffocate opponents in under 7 passes.
Harry Kane is averaging 0.91 non-penalty goals per 90 in the Bundesliga this season. That's not a striker having a good run — that's a generational output.
Dortmund have had more shots from outside the box than any team in Germany this season. They've scored 2. Someone tell them.
RB Leipzig average 56 passes per sequence before a shot. The most patient team in the Bundesliga — and it's working: 2.1 xG per game.
Inter's defensive record at home this season: 18 games, 4 goals conceded. That's a fortress, not a football club.
Osimhen has scored 14 Serie A goals but only 3 have come from inside the six-yard box. He's a threat from anywhere in the area.
AC Milan's passing accuracy this season: 88.3%. But their conversion from chance to goal is the worst in the top 6. Pretty football, wasteful finishing.
Roma have been involved in more games decided by a single goal than any other Serie A side. Either very good or very lucky — the xG says it's somewhere in between.
Across the top 5 leagues, teams that score first win 71% of the time. In the Premier League, that rises to 78%. Home advantage? Barely matters once you're ahead.
The average goals per game in Europe's top 5 leagues has risen 0.4 since 2018. Defences haven't caught up with attacking evolution.
The top 5 leagues combined have seen a 22% increase in progressive passes over the last 3 seasons. Football is getting faster and more direct.
Which league has the highest xG per shot? Not the Premier League. Bundesliga teams take fewer but higher-quality shots than any other top league.
